data.title: Walmart (WMT) Will Report Its Earnings Today. Here Is What to Expect
data.description:
Retail giant Walmart (WMT) is set to announce its Q4 FY25 results on February 20. WMT stock has gained over 79% over the past year, fueled by strong e-commerce growth and market share gains from smaller retailers. Wall Street analysts expect the company to report earnings of $0.65 per share for Q4, up 8% year-over-year. Further, revenues are expected to rise by 11% from the same quarter last year, reaching $179.95 billion, according to data from the TipRanks Forecast page.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Interestingly, WMT has a solid earnings surprise history. The company exceeded earnings estimates in all the previous nine quarters.

Analysts’ Views on WMT Ahead of Q4 Results

Ahead of Walmart’s Q4 results, most analysts reaffirmed their Buy rating and raised their price targets on the stock. One such analyst is Peter J. Keith of Piper Sandler, who raised his price target on the stock to $118 from $93 and maintained an Overweight rating, citing a stronger sales environment and continued market share gains. He highlighted that Walmart stock is already up 15% year-to-date, outperforming the S&P 500’s (SPX) 4% gain.

The firm expects Walmart’s sales to benefit in early 2025 as consumers are buying big-ticket items like electronics sooner to avoid potential price hikes from tariffs. This trend, seen across big-box retailers, could temporarily boost sales as people rush to make purchases before prices go up. Further, Keith increased his Q4 U.S. comp sales estimate to 4.5% from 2.5%, noting Walmart’s steady EBIT growth despite weak discretionary spending.

Similarly, another analyst, Peter Benedict of Robert W. Baird, raised his price target on Walmart to $115 from $100 while maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates solid Q4 results and believes Walmart’s growth momentum will continue into 2025.

Options Traders Anticipate a 5.05% Move

Using TipRanks’ Options tool, we can see what options traders are expecting from the stock immediately after its earnings report. The expected earnings move is determined by calculating the at-the-money straddle of the options closest to expiration after the earnings announcement. If this sounds complicated, don’t worry, the Options tool does this for you.

Indeed, it currently says that options traders are expecting a 5.05% move in either direction.

Is Walmart Stock a Good Buy Right Now?

Turning to Wall Street, analysts have a Strong Buy consensus rating on WMT stock based on 26 Buys and two Holds assigned in the past three months, as indicated by the graphic below. The analysts’ average price target on WMT stock of $110.04 implies an upside potential of 6.03%.

See more WMT analyst ratings

Disclosure
data.author: Shalu Saraf

data.title: Palantir (PLTR) Sinks as the Pentagon Prepares to Slash the Defense Budget
data.description:
Palantir’s (PLTR) share price plummeted by as much as 12.5% on Wednesday after a report by The Washington Post said that the Pentagon is preparing to slash the current $850 billion U.S. defense budget by 8% per year for the next five years. As a major provider of software and technology services to defense agencies, Palantir’s revenue could be significantly impacted by this move.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

According to the report, Hegseth ordered senior Pentagon leaders to develop plans for the budget cuts by Monday. This is part of the Trump administration’s broader effort to reduce government spending, which is being led by Tesla CEO Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). Interestingly, though, Palantir CEO Alex Karp defended Musk during an appearance on CNBC’s Squawk Box.

Indeed, he suggested that Musk is the most qualified person to lead this initiative and called for left-leaning politicians to have a dialogue in order to work together. However, the opposite has been happening so far, as Democrats have vocally opposed cutting wasteful government spending. This has led to former Democrat adviser Dan Turrentine slamming the Democrat’s strategy as “terrible” during Jesse Watters Primetime because it fails the “common sense” test, especially after DOGE uncovered legitimate issues.

What Is the Prediction for PLTR Stock?

Turning to Wall Street, analysts have a Hold consensus rating on PLTR stock based on two Buys, 10 Holds, and five Sells assigned in the past three months, as indicated by the graphic below. After a 380% rally in its share price over the past year, the average PLTR price target of $88.60 per share implies 21% downside risk. 

See more PLTR analyst ratings
data.author: Vince Condarcuri

data.title: Retail Investor ‘Mania’ Is Back in the Stock Market, Says JPMorgan Chase (JPM)
data.description:
Retail investors are piling into the stock market at a manic pace, says JPMorgan Chase (JPM).

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Data from the largest U.S. bank shows that the share of individual investors trading in U.S. stocks has reached 25%, more than double the level five years ago before the pandemic struck, and close to the record seen at the start of 2021 during the meme stock craze that was fueled by GameStop (GME).

This year, retail investors appear to be piling into stocks due to ongoing enthusiasm for U.S. President Donald Trump and expectations that he will usher in a more favorable regulatory environment for companies, stocks, and cryptocurrencies.

Signs of Froth

JPMorgan says the current trading action seen in the market is reminiscent of the meme stock frenzy that kicked off 2021. Retail traders, organized primarily through the WallStreetBets Reddit chat forum, drove a short squeeze on GME stock that sent the share price up 1,500% over a two-week period before it collapsed.

Many former meme stocks are surging again, with shares of legacy smartphone maker BlackBerry (BB) up 55% this year despite the company’s poor finances. Other stocks popular with retail investors such as Palantir Technologies (PLTR) and Strategy (MSTR) are also up sharply this year. JPMorgan says signs of froth are now emerging in U.S. markets and is urging investors to be cautious.

JPM stock is up 17% year to date.

Is JPM Stock a Buy?

The stock of JPMorgan Chase has a consensus Moderate Buy rating among 19 Wall Street analysts. That rating is based on 12 Buy and seven Hold recommendations issued in the last three months. The average JPM price target of $275.60 implies 1.12% downside from current levels.

Read more analyst ratings on JPM stock
data.author: Joel Baglole

data.title: Palantir (PLTR) CEO Alex Karp to Sell $1.2 Billion of Company Stock
data.description:
Palantir Technologies (PLTR) CEO Alex Karp has moved to sell $1.2 billion worth of the data analytics company’s stock.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Karp has adopted a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to sell up to 9,975,000 PLTR shares through Sept. 12 of this year. Based on the current trading price of $123, Karp’s planned sale of PLTR stock would net him proceeds of $1.23 billion.

However, in filing the new 10b5-1 trading plan, Karp canceled a previous plan that would have seen him sell much more stock — 48.9 million shares worth $6.01 billion. A 10b5-1 plan is used to remove the appearance of bias or that a company insider is benefitting from nonpublic information.

Blistering Rally

Karp’s planned stock sale comes as shares of Palantir enjoy a blistering rally. So far this year, PLTR stock has increased 63%, bringing its 12-month gain to 427%. Palantir’s big run has been driven by strong financial results, the company’s artificial intelligence (AI) strategy, and retail investor enthusiasm for the stock.

Karp previously sold $1.95 billion worth of PLTR stock in 2024. At least part of last year’s stock sale was done to cover required tax-withholding obligations in connection with the vesting of some restricted stock units that Karp owns. Palantir’s share price continues to trounce the benchmark S&P 500 index that is up 4% this year.

Is PLTR Stock a Buy?

Palantir Technologies stock has a consensus Hold rating among 17 Wall Street analysts. That rating is based on two Buy, 10 Hold, and five Sell recommendations issued in the last three months. The average PLTR price target of $88.60 implies 28.43% downside risk from current levels.

Read more analyst ratings on PLTR stock
data.author: Joel Baglole

data.title: Buy Capital One (COF) Stock Ahead of Discover Acquisition, Says Bank of America
data.description:
Bank of America (BAC) sees Capital One Financials (COF) planned acquisition of rival Discover
Financial Services (DFS) as a big catalyst and is urging investors to buy the stock.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Mihir Bhatia, a top four-star rated analyst at Bank of America, upgraded COF stock to a Buy rating from neutral previously and raised his price target on the shares to $235 from $207, implying about 16% upside from current levels.

Bhatia’s positive assessment comes after shareholders from both companies voted to approve Capital One’s takeover of Discover Financial earlier this week. The analyst said the deal should create operational improvements at Capital One, with the combined company expected to achieve returns in the mid-teens on equity. The $35.30 billion all-stock deal is expected to close within the first half of this year.

Bright Future

Bhatia adds that the purchase of Discover should improve Capital One’s standing in the payments space by giving it access to Discover’s closed-loop network. That should allow Capital One to better compete in the small business and premium consumer market segments.

“A combination of Improving credit trends, pending acquisition-related revenue, and expense synergies as well as the potential for increased capital returns provide a cascade of catalysts that should excite investors and can provide near-term upside,” wrote Bhatia in a note to clients.

COF stock has risen 17% so far in 2025.

Is COF Stock a Buy?

The stock of Capital One has a consensus Moderate Buy rating among 16 Wall Street analysts. That rating is based on eight Buy and eight Hold recommendations issued in the last three months. The average COF price target of $213.07 implies 2.39% upside from current levels.

Read more analyst ratings on COF stock
data.author: Joel Baglole

data.title: Trump Says that a Tesla Factory in India Is “Unfair” to the U.S.
data.description:
In a recent interview with Fox News, U.S. President Donald Trump shared his thoughts about Tesla (TSLA) potentially building a factory in India. Unsurprisingly, he called it “unfair” to the U.S. Trump’s issue isn’t with the factory itself but rather with the fact that India’s high tariffs on cars make it difficult for American companies like Tesla to sell their vehicles in the country. This isn’t the first time Trump spoke out about India’s tariffs, as he brought it up during a recent U.S. visit by Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Tesla CEO Elon Musk has also been vocal about India’s tariffs, which can be as high as 100% on electric vehicles. Musk argues that these tariffs give local automakers like Tata Motors (IN:TATAMOTORS) an unfair advantage, which makes it impossible for foreign companies to compete in the Indian market. However, India has recently announced a new EV policy that could change things.

Indeed, if a carmaker invests at least $500 million and sets up a factory, they’ll qualify for a significantly lower import tax rate of 15%. As a result, Tesla is moving forward with its plans for India, despite Trump’s comments, and has selected locations for two showrooms in New Delhi and Mumbai. It has also posted job ads for mid-level roles in the country.

Is Tesla a Buy, Sell, or Hold?

Turning to Wall Street, analysts have a Hold consensus rating on TSLA stock based on 13 Buys, 12 Holds, and 10 Sells assigned in the past three months, as indicated by the graphic below. After an 87% rally in its share price over the past year, the average TSLA price target of $340.50 per share implies 6% downside risk. 

See more TSLA analyst ratings
data.author: Vince Condarcuri

data.title: Dogecoin Struggles as Scandals, Regulations, and Inflation Hammer Crypto
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE-USD) has been on a downward slide, with its price currently hovering around $0.253969. This decline isn’t happening in a vacuum; several factors are contributing to DOGE’s recent struggles.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

LIBRA Scandal Shakes Confidence

The recent collapse of the LIBRA token has shaken up the memecoin community. Promoted by Argentine President Javier Milei, LIBRA’s value skyrocketed before crashing, leading to fraud allegations and calls for Milei’s impeachment. This fiasco has eroded trust in memecoins, causing investors to tread cautiously, according to the Wall Street Journal.

Bitcoin Decline Dampens Enthusiasm for Altcoins

Beyond specific scandals, the broader cryptocurrency market is experiencing a downturn. Bitcoin’s recent dip below $95,000, influenced by inflation concerns and potential Federal Reserve rate hikes, has cast a shadow over the entire crypto landscape. As Bitcoin often sets the market tone, its decline has dampened enthusiasm for altcoins like Dogecoin.

Dogecoin Whale Activity Declines

On-chain data reveals a significant drop in large-scale Dogecoin transactions, according to Coinspeaker. Whale activity has decreased by nearly 88% since November 2024, suggesting that major holders are either offloading their positions or staying on the sidelines. This reduction in big-player involvement can lead to decreased liquidity and increased price volatility.

Dogecoin’s Technical Analysis Points to Resistance

From a technical standpoint, Dogecoin faces hurdles. Analysts note on X that DOGE needs to surpass resistance levels at $0.2560 and $0.2600 to initiate a meaningful recovery. Failure to break through these points could result in further declines, with support levels at $0.2480 and $0.2420 being critical to monitor.

In summary, Dogecoin’s recent price drop is the result of a combination of market-wide issues, specific events shaking investor confidence, and technical challenges. At the time of writing, Dogecoin is sitting at $0.2539.
data.author: Annika Masrani

data.title: Super Micro Computer Stock (SMCI) Fully Recovers Losses Caused by Hindenburg Research
data.description:
Shares of Super Micro Computer (SMCI) are surging today in continuation of a week-long rally that has seen them fully recover from a short-seller’s report last summer. Indeed, the report, which was published by Hindenburg Research, accused the technology hardware company of accounting violations and failing to disclose its relationships with suppliers. However, Super Micro has since denied these allegations and took steps to address the concerns. As a result, SMCI stock has been on a tear in 2025, with a nearly 100% gain that has made it the top-performing member of the S&P 500 (SPX).

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Furthermore, Super Micro’s business update last week came with long-term targets that seem to have increased investor confidence in its ability to recover. In fact, Super Micro’s CEO, Charles Liang, believes that the firm can reach $40 billion in revenue for Fiscal Year 2026, which is higher than analysts’ forecasts of around $30 billion. It is also worth noting that the company’s server systems for data centers that use Nvidia’s (NVDA) AI chips are now in full production and that the firm has a major deal with Elon Musk’s xAI data center in Tennessee.

In addition, Super Micro is working to submit its delayed SEC filings by February 25 and is searching for a new CFO. Nevertheless, Super Micro’s shares remain far below their record closing price of $114 last March despite its recent upswing.

Is SMCI Stock a Good Buy?

Turning to Wall Street, analysts have a Hold consensus rating on SMCI stock based on three Buys, two Holds, and two Sells assigned in the past three months, as indicated by the graphic below. Furthermore, the average SMCI price target of $36.50 per share implies 41% downside risk.

See more SMCI analyst ratings
data.author: Vince Condarcuri

data.title: Mastercard (MA) Pushes Deeper into Crypto as it Develops ‘Real World Solutions’
data.description:
Credit card giant Mastercard (MA) is pushing deeper into cryptocurrencies, saying it is focused on developing “real world solutions” for consumers.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Mastercard’s head of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies, Raj Dhamodharan, said in a recent interview with CoinDesk that the credit card issuer is moving beyond the experimentation phase when it comes to Bitcoin (BTC) and other digital assets.

Dhamodharan said that Mastercard now enables stablecoin payments for financial institutions, reflecting a growing trend in crypto adoption worldwide. Last week, the payments company announced a partnership with crypto compliance firm Notabene, which will integrate Mastercard’s Crypto Credential into its SafeTransact platform to make digital asset transactions more secure and easier to use.

A Bridge for Digital Payments

The Crypto Credential system is a focus of Mastercard’s overall crypto strategy. It allows users to send funds using familiar identifiers like email addresses rather than digital wallets. The system also helps prevent misdirected transactions by verifying whether a recipient’s digital wallet can receive an asset.

Dhamodharan said that Mastercard’s goal is to be a bridge between traditional finance and blockchain networks. The company plans to announce additional partnerships and use cases for crypto throughout 2025, reinforcing its commitment to integrating digital assets into global payment systems.

MA stock has risen 26% in the last 12 months.

Is MA Stock a Buy?

Mastercard’s stock has a consensus Strong Buy rating among 29 Wall Street analysts. That rating is based on 27 Buy and two Hold recommendations issued in the last three months. The average MA price target of $626.89 implies 10.09% upside from current levels.

Read more analyst ratings on MA stock
data.author: Joel Baglole

data.title: Strategy (MSTR) Raises Another $2 Billion to Buy More Bitcoin
data.description:
Strategy (MSTR) is raising another $2 billion to buy more Bitcoin (BTC).

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The software company turned serial Bitcoin acquirer, which until recently was known as MicroStrategy, is raising the funds via 0% convertible notes. The new money raised will be used to buy more Bitcoin as the price of the largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization dips.

Led by Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, Strategy is the world’s largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, with 478,740 digital tokens that are currently worth more than $45 billion. Saylor recently rebranded the company as Strategy, giving it a new name and logo, to reflect the move away from software and to cryptocurrencies.

Buying the Dip

Strategy has consistently bough more Bitcoin anytime the biggest crypto has seen its price drop. BTC is currently trading at $96,350, down from an all-time high above $109,000 reached on Jan. 20 of this year, the date of U.S. President Donald Trump’s inauguration.

MSTR stock has been on a blistering rally over the past year as investors increasingly view the company as a proxy for Bitcoin. In the past 12 months, Strategy’s share price has increased an incredible 371%. There is speculation that MSTR stock could be added to the benchmark S&P 500 index when it next rebalances in June of this year.

Is MSTR Stock a Buy?

The stock of MicroStrategy currently has a consensus Strong Buy rating among 11 Wall Street analysts. That rating is based on 11 Buy recommendations issued in the past three months. There are no Hold or Sell ratings on the stock. The average MSTR price target of $548.91 implies 65.33% upside from current levels.

Read more analyst ratings on MSTR stock
data.author: Joel Baglole
